channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: OpenAI introduces AI-generated pets for its Codex app
item.description: It's like Microsoft's Clippy, but useful.

item.title: 'It took 9 seconds': tech founder outlines how rogue Claude-powered AI tool wiped entire company database and backups
item.description: Cursor AI agent deleted a production database and backups in nine seconds, exposing serious flaws in API design and backup isolation

item.title: How to watch Kentucky Derby 2026: live stream horse racing online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how you can watch Kentucky Derby 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, with Renegade the favorite for one of the world's great horse races.
